texto: People think doping is for lazy people who want to avoid hard work. That might be true in some cases, but in mine, as with many riders I knew, it was precisely the opposite. EPO granted the ability to suffer more; to push yourself farther and harder than you'd ever imagined, in both training and racing.
explicacao: Citação de Daniel Coyle sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “People think doping is for lazy people who want to avoid hard work. That might be true in some ca…” articula reflexao, doping, race em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e trabalho.
